name: Construction
description_short: Construction Federal Credit Union is a Michigan-based credit union serving members of the construction industry with deposit accounts, loans, and financial services.
description_long: Construction Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial institution headquartered in Michigan, with its 51st Annual Meeting scheduled for June 3rd, 2026 at the Construction Association of Michigan in Bloomfield Hills. The credit union was established to serve the financial needs of construction industry professionals and related members. The organization offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, home equity lines of credit, boat loans, and VISA credit cards. They provide digital banking capabilities, shared branching access for convenience, and accessibility features on their website. Construction Federal Credit Union distinguishes itself through industry-specific membership targeting construction workers and professionals, partnerships with the Construction Association of Michigan and Home Builders Association, and competitive loan rates advertised on their homepage. The credit union appears to be a legitimate, established institution with multiple decades of operation. However, their website contains broken links (404 errors on credit cards and locations pages), outdated blog content from 2019, and limited accessible information about membership requirements, current locations, or full service details. The dated website content and navigation issues suggest the organization may benefit from modernization of their digital presence. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Offers competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.25% APR
30-year mortgage products available with rates as low as 6.58% APR
Provides home equity lines of credit at 8.50% APR or better
Access to shared branch network for member convenience
VISA credit card products with rewards potential at 6.87% APR
Member-owned credit union structure typically offers better rates than traditional banks
Dedicated support for lost/stolen credit cards with 24/7 hotline (1-800-237-6211)
cons: Website contains multiple broken links and 404 errors preventing access to credit card and location information
Blog content is outdated (last update April 2019), suggesting inactive digital communication
Limited transparency on membership eligibility requirements and membership restrictions
Unclear current branch locations and hours due to non-functional website navigation
No visible information about online account opening or digital onboarding process
best_for: Construction industry professionals seeking industry-specific financial services
Michigan residents near Bloomfield Hills seeking local credit union membership
Borrowers interested in competitive mortgage and auto loan rates
Members of construction trade associations eligible for credit union membership
diagnosis: Construction Federal Credit Union is best for construction industry members in Michigan seeking competitive loan rates and traditional credit union benefits. Primary caveat: the website is significantly outdated with broken navigation, limiting ability to verify current services, locations, and membership requirements before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
